news.summary: Core Access Surgical Technologies, Inc. (CAST) based in Atlanta revealed on May 14, 2025, that their latest Clinical Trial Manuscript has been approved for publication in the Journal of the Society of Laparoscopic and Robotic Surgeons (JSLS). JSLS is a leading open-access journal in the field. This development signifies a significant achievement in the medical community.
news.headline: Core Access Surgical Technologies (CAST) trial manuscript accepted for publication in JSLS, a top journal for surgeons.

news.summary: North America's top siding brand has been chosen as the primary supplier of siding and trim for Davidson Homes. This decision was made official on May 14, 2025, in Chicago. James Hardie Building Products Inc., a subsidiary of James Hardie Industries plc (ASX: JHX) (NYSE: JHX), has solidified its position as the leading brand of siding in the region*. This partnership highlights the trust and preference Davidson Homes has in James Hardie's products.
news.headline: James Hardie's siding becomes preferred supplier for Davidson Homes; expands product deal. - CHICAGO, May 14, 2025 /PRNewswire

news.summary: Freshwater Development, a real estate development firm, has unveiled the Penthouses at 111 State in downtown Traverse City. The property boasts two full-floor residences, priced at $2.95 million and $3.25 million, aiming to be the premier luxury penthouses in the area and potentially break state price records. These condominiums promise a lavish lifestyle with direct access.
news.headline: Freshwater Development introduces Penthouses at 111 State in Traverse City with residences priced at $2.95m and $3.25m.

news.summary: In Geneva, Switzerland today, SEALSQ has announced plans to invest $10 million in WISeSat.Space. This investment aims to speed up the deployment of a satellite constellation, enhance space-based Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) communications, and facilitate decentralized Internet of Things (IoT) transactions.
news.headline: SEALSQ invests $10 million in WISeSat.Space for satellite deployment, QKD comms, and decentralized IoT transactions.

news.summary: The Oracle Health Clinical AI Agent is making a significant impact in the healthcare industry, particularly in Canada, by reducing documentation time for practitioners by 30%. This innovative AI-powered tool, which operates through voice and screen commands, is revolutionizing health systems and improving efficiency. The success of this technology is evident in the substantial time savings it offers, highlighting the potential for enhanced productivity and streamlined processes in the medical field.
news.headline: Oracle Health introduces Clinical AI Agent in Canada to reduce documentation time by 30% for health organizations.

news.summary: In New York, impact.com, a prominent commerce partnership management platform, revealed its impressive performance in Q1 2025. The company saw success due to increased acknowledgment in the advertising sector that partner-based marketing is integral to a comprehensive marketing approach. This understanding has led brands to utilize partner-led strategies to engage genuinely with their audience, ultimately boosting revenue. Throughout the quarter, impact.com made significant investments in various product enhancements.
news.headline: impact.com experienced strong growth in Q1 2025 due to partner-led marketing, essential for brands seeking authentic connections.

news.summary: A Seattle-based company known as Tensor9 has unveiled a cutting-edge enterprise any-prem platform that empowers SaaS vendors to target enterprise clients. The company disclosed securing $4 million in a seed funding round, which was spearheaded by Wing VC. Noteworthy participants in the investment round include Devang Sachdev and NVAngels, Level Up Ventures, as well as notable industry experts formerly associated with Google, Cockroach Labs, Benchling, and Amazon. Tensor9's innovative solution provides SaaS and AI vendors with the capability to offer their services to enterprise customers.
news.headline: Tensor9 raises $4M for enterprise platform to enable SaaS vendors to sell to enterprise customers. Led by Wing VC.

news.summary: In Boston today, Superside unveiled its latest innovation - the Custom AI Image Models. This new offering revolutionizes the process of generating brand-consistent visuals on a large scale. By integrating as a Figma plug-in and customized to match a brand's assets, teams can now quickly produce visuals, boosting the marketing process and leading to quicker returns on investment. The solution addresses common challenges creative teams encounter such as high costs, with the aim of streamlining the visual content creation process.
news.headline: Superside unveils Custom AI Image Models for brand visuals, speeding up marketing with Figma plug-in, delivering consistency.

news.summary: In the fourth quarter of fiscal year, the enterprise software company exceeded expectations with its earnings and revenue figures. Additionally, its forecast for fiscal year 2026 is optimistic. As a result, Dynatrace's stock saw an increase in value. The company's strong performance has prompted positive reactions from investors and financial analysts.
news.headline: Dynatrace beats Q4 earnings and revenue estimate, guides higher for fiscal 2026. Stock rises.

news.summary: On Wednesday, Novo Nordisk signed a substantial $2.2 billion deal related to obesity, causing a surge in the shares of Septerna. This agreement propelled Septerna's stocks to remarkable heights.
news.headline: Novo Nordisk signs $2.2 billion obesity deal, boosting Septerna's shares dramatically.

news.summary: A logistics company named Avenger Logistics, operating in Chattanooga, Tennessee, was recently recognized as a Preferred Carrier by project44. This recognition is a prestigious achievement as it places Avenger Logistics among a small group of less than 2% of the project44 network, which comprises over a certain number of companies. Avenger Logistics is a subsidiary of MODE Global and specializes in third-party logistics (3PL) services.
news.headline: Avenger Logistics is now a Preferred Carrier by project44, only less than 2% of their 3PL network.

news.summary: A prominent investment solutions provider, Advisors Asset Management (AAM), in collaboration with Wilshire, a leading company, has launched a multi-strategy private markets fund. This fund offers investors a simplified pathway to private equity, private credit, and real assets. The partnership aims to provide streamlined access to these lucrative investment avenues. The initiative was announced in Monument, Colo. and New York on May 14, 2025. This strategic move opens up new opportunities for investors looking to diversify their portfolios.
news.headline: AAM partners with Wilshire to expand distribution of the Wilshire Private Assets Fund, offering access to private equity, credit, and real assets.

news.summary: Wingtra's Vertical Take-Off and Landing (VTOL) drones have recently obtained more AgEagle RedEdge-P ™ cameras to enhance their capabilities in precision agriculture and geospatial applications. The addition of these cameras will enable the drones to gather more detailed and accurate data for various purposes.
news.headline: AgEagle sold multiple cameras to Wingtra for their VTOL drones for precision agriculture and geospatial applications.

news.summary: T-Mobile's 5G network is revolutionizing the sports experience, with a significant presence at the upcoming PGA Championship from May 12-18 at Quail Hollow Club in Charlotte, North Carolina. The telecommunications giant, known by its stock ticker NASDAQ: TMUS, revealed that its cutting-edge 5G Advanced network will enhance on-course and off-course experiences for fans. The PGA of America is set to leverage T-Mobile's technology, including network slicing, to provide unprecedented connectivity and innovative features throughout the event.
news.headline: T-Mobile's 5G to power PGA Championship at Quail Hollow Club in May; providing breakthrough experiences on and off the course. #TMUS #5G

news.summary: A company based in Boca Raton, Florida, VILAS Ventures, has announced its backing for CND Life Sciences with a significant investment of $13.5 million in their Series A3 funding round. The purpose of this funding is to support the expansion of the Syn-One Test®, a diagnostic tool for Parkinson’s disease, and to further the development of diagnostics for neurodegenerative conditions.
news.headline: VILAS Ventures invests $13.5M in CND Life Sciences to advance Parkinson's diagnostic test.

news.summary: Durham, North Carolina - Bridge II Sports (BIIS) announces the 13th annual Valor Games Southeast (VGSE) in the Triangle area, supported by presenting sponsor MetLife and its employees. The theme "Undaunted, Undeterred. Undefied." embodies this year's event. Since 2013, over 1,000 Veterans with disabilities have participated in VGSE, uniting through adapted sports competition. The upcoming games span three days and feature eleven different sports.
news.headline: "Valor Games Southeast celebrates 13 years strong, engaging over 1,000 Veterans since 2013. MetLife supporting sponsor."

news.summary: In San Francisco, DiffuseDrive, a cutting-edge physical AI firm, revealed two significant achievements. The company secured $3.5 million in seed funding and achieved numerous successful implementations with Fortune 500 corporations. Their innovative generative AI technology revolutionizes data scarcity by rapidly producing photorealistic content, providing enterprises with a competitive advantage. Co-founders Balint Pasztor and Roland Pinter, experts in vision AI, made the move from Hungary to Silicon Valley to propel the company forward.
news.headline: DiffuseDrive secures $3.5M in seed funding and has successful deployments with Fortune 500 companies. AI platform revolutionizes data creation.

news.summary: American Hartford Gold, the leading precious metals retailer in the US, has unveiled the 2025 Silver coin made from the famous SS Tilawa Shipwreck Silver. The coin holds historical significance and is now accessible to collectors and investors. This exclusive piece is available for purchase, showcasing the unique treasure recovered from the shipwreck. The company's announcement comes on May 14, 2025, marking a significant event in the precious metals market. Investors and collectors are encouraged to seize the opportunity to own a piece of history with this limited-edition coin.
news.headline: American Hartford Gold releases exclusive 2025 Silver Britannia SS Tilawa Coin made from SS Tilawa Shipwreck Silver.

news.summary: The company reported a record-breaking first quarter with revenues reaching $2.2 billion, marking a significant increase of 4.2%. During this period, the company also achieved a first quarter net income of $30.3 million. Shareholders will benefit from an accrued patronage dividend of $61.6 million. It has been notably recognized as the top player in home improvement on Forbes' 2025 Best Customer Service List. Additionally, the company secured the 5th position in the list of best franchises.
news.headline: Ace Hardware's Q1 2025: $2.2B revenue (4.2% increase), $30.3M net income, $61.6M patronage dividend. #1 in customer service. #5 best franchise.

news.summary: Valmet Oyj's market announcement on May 14, 2025, at 3:45 p.m. EEST in Helsinki, reported that 509 Valmet shares were returned to the company without compensation as per the Deferred Share Plan 2023-2025.
news.headline: Valmet Oyj returned 509 shares under Deferred Share Plan on May 14, 2025.

news.summary: A data center can achieve power savings of up to 40% by implementing an end-to-end liquid-cooling solution, leading to faster deployment and reduced time-to-online. Additionally, the water consumption can be reduced by up to 40% with warm water cooling, allowing for operation at inlet temperatures of up to 45°C and decreasing the dependence on chillers.
news.headline: Supermicro introduces DLC-2 with up to 40% power savings, 40% reduced water consumption, 20% lowering of TCO in data centers.

news.summary: At a recent event held by the Association of Equipment Manufacturers on the National Mall, Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) unveiled its latest innovations in manufacturing and construction. The event, which took place on May 14, 2025, featured equipment that showcased the future of these industries. Caterpillar Inc. highlighted its cutting-edge technology and iconic machinery during the exhibition. The event attracted a significant number of attendees and industry professionals, who had the opportunity to witness firsthand the advancements being made by Caterpillar Inc. in the field.
news.headline: Caterpillar celebrates 100 years of construction with showcase of machinery at National Mall event in May 2025.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Deepwatch, a prominent AI+Human cyber resilience platform, proudly announced that two of its outstanding leaders, Laura Ellen and Colleen Grounds, have been acknowledged by CRN® for their exceptional contributions. Laura Ellen, serving as the VP of Channel Sales, and Colleen Grounds, functioning as the VP of Field and Channel Marketing, have been included in the esteemed Women of the Channel list for 2025. This recognition by CRN® highlights women across vendors, distributors, solution providers, and other channel-focused entities, honoring their impactful work in the industry.
news.headline: Deepwatch's Laura Ellen and Colleen Grounds make CRN's 2025 Women of the Channel list, celebrating female leaders in the industry.

news.summary: A company based in Somerset, New Jersey, revealed on May 14, 2025, the introduction of Broadband IQ™ for Enterprise Sales. This software-as-a-service (SaaS) product is designed for Service Provider Enterprise sales teams aiming to quicken the quoting process. VCTI, the creator of the product, specializes in broadband expansion and network technology.
news.headline: VCTI launched Broadband IQ™ for Enterprise Sales, a SaaS offering for Service Providers, aiming to expedite time to quote.

news.summary: Kentucky Bourbon Trail now shifting its attention towards wood finishing exploration, as RD1 Spirits introduces RD1 Distillery at The Commons in Lexington, KY. The new brand destination, situated just a few minutes from downtown, was officially unveiled on May 14, 2025. This development marks a significant expansion in the bourbon industry, welcoming visitors to experience this unique offering.
news.headline: RD1 Spirits opens immersive distillery in Lexington, KY, focusing on KY Bourbon Trail with wood finishing exploration.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Twilio (NYSE: TWLO) commenced its user conference, SIGNAL, showcasing its upcoming platform tailored for improved customer engagement in a data-driven and AI-focused landscape. The event revealed upgrades to the Customer Data Platform (CDP) and noteworthy enhancements to the Communications Platform as a Service (CPaaS). These updates introduce novel conversational features and advancements to provide real-time, personalized engagements for top brands.
news.headline: Twilio introduces customer engagement platform at SIGNAL 2025, optimized for AI with enhanced CDP; CPaaS updates included.

news.summary: The announcement was made in Wakefield, Mass., that the Mojaloop Foundation has launched a global partner program aimed at promoting financial inclusion on a global scale. The initiative focuses on advancing inclusive instant payment systems (IIPS) and involves partnerships with key organizations like AfricaNenda, FNA, Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation (GLEIF), and Modular Open-Source Identity Platform. This new program will allow the Mojaloop Foundation and its partners to collaborate and contribute to shaping the future of IIPS.
news.headline: Mojaloop Foundation introduces global partner program to advance financial inclusion worldwide with esteemed organizations.

news.summary: Boomi, a company based in Conshohocken, Pennsylvania, has revealed a multi-year Strategic Collaboration Agreement with Amazon Web Services (AWS).
news.headline: Boomi partners with AWS for enterprise AI integration, automation, and SAP migration.

news.summary: Brittany Flanagan has been appointed to lead the organizational expansion and culture strategy for a rapidly growing virtual GI healthcare company. Oshi Health, a nationwide multidisciplinary gastroenterology clinic, made the announcement in New York on May 14, 2025. This appointment comes as the company continues to experience substantial growth and increasing demand for its services.
news.headline: Brittany Flanagan becomes Chief People Officer at Oshi Health to expand workforce and culture strategy, New York based GI clinic.

news.summary: In Chicago, G2 has unveiled its 2025 Buyer Behavior Report following a worldwide survey of B2B software buyers. The report, titled "AI Now Means Always Included," delves into the impact of AI on the software purchasing process. It highlights that AI has transitioned from a novelty to a crucial element in the research and evaluation phases. The data was validated using G2's proprietary data to enrich the insights. This year's findings emphasize the increasing significance of AI in staying ahead in the market, especially during the research and assessment stages.
news.headline: G2 report reveals AI disrupting B2B software buying journey; AI now essential in research and evaluation stages.

news.summary: In New York today, Cyera, a rapidly growing data security firm, unveiled the Certified DSPM Architect program - the initial tool-neutral certification geared towards enhancing knowledge in Data Security Posture Management (DSPM). As the era of AI emerges, driven by data, businesses are swiftly embracing AI; however, a notable portion lack clarity on a fundamental aspect of trust - comprehending and safeguarding their data. This certification aims to address this issue and improve the data security community’s grasp of DSPM.
news.headline: Cyera introduces industry's first Certified DSPM Architect program to enhance data security with AI, addressing the trust gap.

news.summary: A health tech startup called SuppCo based in New York is changing the way people approach their supplement routines. They have recently revealed collaborations with prominent health experts to revolutionize the supplements sector by offering practical guidelines that promote improved results and overall wellness. Through these partnerships, SuppCo users will have the opportunity to follow the specific supplement plans suggested by renowned professionals in key areas of preventive health, ranging from longevity.
news.headline: SuppCo partners with health experts to revolutionize supplement industry, offering actionable protocols for better outcomes.

news.summary: In Houston, Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) revealed a significant development in its private cloud offerings, marking a substantial advancement in the sector. The deployment is set to redefine customer expectations of private cloud services, building on HPE's extensive experience and incorporating HPE Morpheus Software. This innovation signifies a pivotal moment in hybrid IT modernization, promising enhanced cost-effectiveness, performance, and ease of use. Notably, the launch includes the availability of HPE Private Cloud Business Edition alongside HPE Morpheus VM Es, solidifying HPE's commitment to revolutionizing private cloud solutions.
news.headline: HPE launches advanced private cloud portfolio, redefining industry standards, emphasizes cost efficiency and simplicity.

news.summary: A company recently expanded its Medical Advisory Board to enhance its product offerings in women's health and family building. The new additions bring the total board members to [number], showcasing the company's commitment to further developing its range of services in these important areas. This move is part of the company's strategy to meet the increasing demand for specialized healthcare solutions tailored to the unique needs of women and families. The bolstered Advisory Board will provide valuable expertise and guidance to support the company's growth and innovation in [specific medical field].
news.headline: Progyny appoints two experts to Medical Advisory Board, expanding services in women’s health and family building.

news.summary: In Miami, ERMA Systems, a prominent company specializing in intelligent MLR (Medical, Legal, and Regulatory) management solutions for the life sciences industry, has appointed Christine Hendrick to its Advisory Board. Christine, the current Director of Commercial Services at Acadia Pharmaceuticals Inc., comes with over 15 years of experience in commercial operations, product launches, and strategic planning in the pharmaceutical sector. Her extensive expertise will greatly benefit ERMA Systems going forward.
news.headline: ERMA Systems appoints Christine Hendrick, Dir. Commercial Services at Acadia Pharmaceuticals, to Advisory Board. Expertise in pharma industry.

news.summary: iOPEX Technologies, based in San Jose, California, has recently announced their strategic acquisition of Areya Technologies, a company based in London. This acquisition is aimed at augmenting iOPEX's capabilities in the field of artificial intelligence. The move is significant in enhancing iOPEX's position in the market and expanding their technological offerings. This acquisition showcases iOPEX's commitment to growth and innovation.
news.headline: iOPEX Technologies acquires Areya Technologies, a specialized Salesforce services provider, in a strategic move.

news.summary: In Boulder, Colorado, Strata is revolutionizing authentication for outdated and unique applications with CloudIAM. This update allows support for various identity providers to ensure smooth operation, even in case of failover situations.
news.headline: Strata Identity recognized in 2025 Gartner report for modernizing authentication; supports multiple identity providers.

news.summary: A company based in Irvine, California, specializing in Connected TV (CTV) and artificial intelligence (AI) programmatic advertising, Viant, has announced its certification by Great Place To Work for the fourth consecutive year. This recognition highlights Viant's dedication to creating a positive work environment.
news.headline: Viant, an advertising company in Irvine, California, has been certified as a Great Place To Work for the fourth consecutive year. #AdTech #CTV #AI

news.summary: A renowned global professional information and software solutions provider, Wolters Kluwer, revealed that its Enablon ESG Excellence solution received accolades at the 2025 We Love Tech Awards. The product was distinguished in the Product - SaaS/UCaaS/XaaS division, acknowledging its innovation and impact on enterprise technology. Enablon ESG Excellence stands out for simplifying the intricacies of ESG through cutting-edge technology. This recognition underscores Wolters Kluwer's commitment to pioneering solutions that address key challenges in the industry.
news.headline: Wolters Kluwer's Enablon ESG Excellence wins 2025 We Love Tech Award in Product - SaaS/UCaaS/XaaS category.

news.summary: Excella, an innovative technology company based in Arlington, has recently appointed Tammy McChain as their Vice President of National Security. McChain will be overseeing Excella's operations within the National Security sector, focusing on client engagements and promoting innovation. As a key member of Excella's senior management, she will play a crucial role in delivering top-notch services and driving growth for the company. With her wealth of experience in this field, McChain is expected to lead Excella to new heights.
news.headline: Excella names Tammy McChain as VP of National Security, in charge of leading Excella's National Security market.

news.summary: In New York, Eight Sleep unveiled its latest products, the Pod 5 and a hydro-powered Blanket, combining artificial intelligence and real-time biometric sensing to enhance sleep quality. The Health Check feature, containing AI-driven algorithms, converts the Pod into a preventive health tool. The Pod 5 marks the company's fifth generation of products, following the success of the acclaimed Pod. These innovations aim to convert any regular bed into a smart and adaptable sleep solution.
news.headline: Eight Sleep introduces Pod 5: AI-Powered Sleep System with immersive tech to improve sleep and health solutions.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas and Eindhoven, Netherlands, Fluence has recently highlighted King City Gardens in their latest Innovator Spotlight. King City Gardens is a leading cannabis cultivator in Ohio, specializing in medical and recreational products.
news.headline: Fluence LED technology boosts production at King City Gardens in Ohio, showcasing growth in medical and recreational cannabis.

news.summary: American Hole ‘n One, a respected provider of hole-in-one insurance for four decades, has revealed its support for the PGA of America’s Golf Retirement Plus program. In this initiative, PGA Golf Professionals can earn incentives for referring qualifying contracts purchased either by their facilities or tournament organizers at select golf courses to AHNO. This collaboration comes as AHNO aims to further strengthen its longstanding presence in the industry.
news.headline: American Hole ‘n One sponsors PGA's Golf Retirement Plus program, offering incentives to PGA pros for referrals.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Affirm (NASDAQ: AFRM) and Costco Wholesale Corporation (“Costco”) (NASDAQ: COST) have revealed a new multi-year collaboration, designating Affirm as the pay-over-time service provider for Costco.com in the U.S. Commencing immediately, U.S. Costco members making online purchases can utilize Affirm during checkout to make payments over time, devoid of late or hidden charges. This partnership comes as consumers have spent an estimated $250 billion online annually.
news.headline: Costco partners with Affirm to offer pay-over-time option on Costco.com with no hidden fees. Consumers spent $250 billion online.

news.summary: Psycho Bunny, a premium menswear brand, has recently welcomed French tennis player Arthur Rinderknech to its roster of tennis ambassadors. Rinderknech, recognized for his strong serve and versatile playing style, will be donning bespoke Psycho Bunny attire during his appearances on the ATP Tour. This collaboration highlights Psycho Bunny's increasing involvement in tennis, catering to emerging talents and established figures. Arthur Rinderknech's addition aligns with the brand's strategy to support athletes in the sport.
news.headline: Psycho Bunny signs French tennis player Arthur Rinderknech in multi-year deal, outfitting him in custom apparel on ATP Tour.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Amplitude, Inc. has introduced enhanced features to unite marketing and product data, aiding marketers in maximizing investments across various channels. The new capabilities enable teams to identify factors influencing conversions and Lifetime Value (LTV), assess Return on Ad Spend more accurately, and target audiences effectively with tailored messages. These enhancements within Amplitude’s comprehensive platform empower marketers to optimize each dollar spent and campaign executed. This development comes as a response to the evolving demands placed on marketers in today's landscape.
news.headline: Amplitude introduces new marketing capabilities to optimize ROI, drive conversions, and target audiences effectively.

news.summary: ArcBest, based in Fort Smith, Arkansas, has reported advancements in their Vaux Vision pilots and named Brian Nachtigall as the new General Manager of Vaux.
news.headline: ArcBest introduces Vaux Vision advancements, appoints Brian Nachtigall as General Manager of Vaux in Fort Smith, Arkansas.

news.summary: Yesterday, it was reported that the global poverty rate has dropped to its lowest level in history, with approximately 9.2% of the world's population living in extreme poverty. This means that around 734 million people are living on less than $1.90 a day. The largest decrease in poverty was seen in East Asia and the Pacific region, where the poverty rate fell to 1.2%. However, progress in reducing poverty has been uneven, with Sub-Saharan Africa still having the highest poverty rate at 41.1%. Despite these improvements, there are concerns that the COVID-19 pandemic could reverse some of the progress made in poverty reduction efforts.
news.headline: DoorDash partners with Wing to expand drone delivery in Charlotte, enhancing service to more customers.

news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Carvana, a leader in online used car sales, introduced a special paint design for NASCAR great Jimmie Johnson's No. 84 Toyota. The design is in honor of his 700th career start at the upcoming Coca-Cola 600 race, taking place at the track where he began his NASCAR Cup Series journey in 2001. Following a notable third-place finish at the 2025 Daytona 500, Johnson is back at Charlotte Motor Speedway, where he has clinched eight Cup Series wins.
news.headline: Carvana commemorates Jimmie Johnson's 700th NASCAR start with a special paint scheme on No. 84 Toyota for Coca-Cola 600.

news.summary: A global leader in apparel manufacturing, Komar, has entered into a strategic partnership with Inspectorio, as unveiled today.
news.headline: Inspectorio partners with Komar to enhance sustainability, compliance, and supply chain visibility globally.
